title: Semiconductor Processing Technicians
description: Perform any or all of the following functions in the manufacture of electronic semiconductors: load semiconductor material into furnace; saw formed ingots into segments; load individual segment into crystal growing chamber and monitor controls; locate crystal axis in ingot using x-ray equipment and saw ingots into wafers; and clean, polish, and load wafers into series of special purpose furnaces, chemical baths, and equipment used to form circuitry and change conductive properties.

tasks.text: Manipulate valves, switches, and buttons, or key commands into control panels to start semiconductor processing cycles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain processing, production, and inspection information and reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect materials, components, or products for surface defects and measure circuitry, using electronic test equipment, precision measuring instruments, microscope, and standard procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Clean semiconductor wafers using cleaning equipment, such as chemical baths, automatic wafer cleaners, or blow-off wands.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study work orders, instructions, formulas, and processing charts to determine specifications and sequence of operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load and unload equipment chambers and transport finished product to storage or to area for further processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and maintain equipment, including replacing etching and rinsing solutions and cleaning bath containers and work area.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place semiconductor wafers in processing containers or equipment holders, using vacuum wand or tweezers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set, adjust, and readjust computerized or mechanical equipment controls to regulate power level, temperature, vacuum, and rotation speed of furnace, according to crystal growing specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Etch, lap, polish, or grind wafers or ingots to form circuitry and change conductive properties, using etching, lapping, polishing, or grinding equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Load semiconductor material into furnace.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor operation and adjust controls of processing machines and equipment to produce compositions with specific electronic properties, using computer terminals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Count, sort, and weigh processed items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate etching time based on thickness of material to be removed from wafers or crystals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect equipment for leaks, diagnose malfunctions, and request repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Align photo mask pattern on photoresist layer, expose pattern to ultraviolet light, and develop pattern, using specialized equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Stamp, etch, or scribe identifying information on finished component according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Scribe or separate wafers into dice.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect reactor to computer, using hand tools and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and weigh amounts of crystal growing materials, mix and grind materials, load materials into container, and monitor processing procedures to help identify crystal growing problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
